EmailTemplate.description: Email template to send Monthly Recurring Request funds to initiate transaction
EmailTemplate.name: Payment Processor Monthly Recurring Request Sent
EmailTemplate.subject: Payment Arrangement Confirmation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Request Funds form received from Canaccede
Hi there,
You have received a Request Funds form from Canaccede
Initiate Transaction
Canaccede
Please click here to update your email preferences.
